creator: riggs@rrr.de
text:
This problem is already solved in my personal devel tree, and we are
going to commit a larger change to the port soon, so there is imho no
need to commit this fix before that.

But thank you for your report!

Riggs

-- 
- "[...] I talked to the computer at great length and
-- explained my view of the Universe to it" said Marvin.
--- And what happened?" pressed Ford.
---- "It committed suicide." said Marvin.
